data.title: Scalable Infrastructure
data.description: Apple.com is built on a scalable infrastructure to handle millions of users concurrently.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes distributed server architecture with CDN support.

data.title: High Availability Systems
data.description: Designed to provide high uptime with minimal disruptions.
data.technical_spec: Implemented with redundancy and failover mechanisms.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Decomposed systems promoting independent deployment and scaling.
data.technical_spec: Employs containerized services managed via orchestration platforms.

data.title: Efficient Data Management
data.description: Employs data management strategies to optimize speed and reliability.
data.technical_spec: Uses distributed databases and advanced caching mechanisms.

data.title: Advanced Load Balancing
data.description: Optimizes resource utilization and increases throughput.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates software and hardware load balancers across global data centers.
